title: Liberalism
author: Thomas Sowell
description: The Conservative Critique of Liberalism explores why liberalism, as the prevailing ideological framework of the modern era, is finding its hegemony coming under sustained pressure. It brings together a collection of essays elucidating the the rich theoretical arguments that those on the philosophical and intellectual right have produced since the French Revolution, in order to make sense of the current political moment. This title contains one or more Open Access chapters.
